message:
feat(registry): add verify and gc CLI subcommands

- handle_registry_verify: reports extension admission status and receipt
- handle_registry_gc: placeholder for local artifact store cleanup
- Fix url crate dependency issue in BuildContext::detect_repository_url
  by using string manipulation instead of url::Url::parse

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
